result.stdout:
Description:
  versionbumper - Increments version numbers in .NET solution projects.

Usage:
  versionbumper [options]

Options:
  -w, --workspace <workspace>  The workspace path containing the solution file and version_definition.json. [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-pineda-0a6d4c29-35012450]
  -a, --add-version-props      Add version properties (ReleaseVersion, AssemblyVersion, FileVersion, Version) to project files that do not already have them. Test projects are excluded.
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  versionbumper - Increments version numbers in .NET solution projects.

Usage:
  versionbumper [options]

Options:
  -w, --workspace <workspace>  The workspace path containing the solution file and version_definition.json. [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-pineda-0a6d4c29-35012450]
  -a, --add-version-props      Add version properties (ReleaseVersion, AssemblyVersion, FileVersion, Version) to project files that do not already have them. Test projects are excluded.
  --version                    Show version information
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information
